roa.docketEntryComment: PROBATION UPDATED PER AB1950, PROBATION EXPIRED MARCH 2, 2021
NOTICE OF MOT & MOT TO WITHDRAW GUILTY PLEA, DECLA OF CNSL FILED
PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
DEFT'S ADD TO CALENDAR MOTION RE RESTITUTION ORDER FILED
CHANGE OF PLEA AND SENTENCING TX FILED

/X:THIS IS AN AMENDED MINUTE ORDER CREATED ON 11-16-20/CAL:MOTION TO WITHDRAW GUILTY PLEA/X:RESTITUTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL BY DEFENDANT/X:AS TOCOUNT #1: THE DEFENDANT HAS SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETED ALL TERMS AND CONDITIONSOF THE DEFERRED ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PROGRAM, THE GUILTY PLEA OF 08-10-2017IS HEREBY SET ASIDE AND A NOT GUILTY PLEA ENTERED, DEFENDANT WITHDRAWS THEADMISSION AS TO ALLEGATION PC 12022,7/X:DENIAL OF ALLEGATION AS TO COUNT #1 IS ENTERED/X:ORAL MOTION TO DISMISS COUNT #1 PURSUANT TO PC 1385 IS GRANTED/X:DEFENDANT TO CONTINUE ON ORIGINAL TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF PROBATION AS TO COUNT #6/

/CAL: RESTITUTION HEARING/DAWT/X:STIPULATION REACHED ON CR-110 RESTITUTIONAMOUNT,/X:CR-110 ORDER FOR RESTITUTION & CR-111 ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT SIGNED AND  FILED IN OPEN COURT AND SERVED TO DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT TO PAY VICTIM COMPENSATION AND GOVERNMENT CLAIMS BOARD, TO REIMBURSE PAYMENTS TO VICTIMMEGAN ALYSSA MURRAY FROM THE RESTITUTION FUND, IN THE AMOUNT OF $8,147,76PLUS FEE AND INTEREST AS INDICATED ON ORDER,/CTORD: CR-110 AND CR-111 SERVED TO DEFENDANT THROUGH COUNSEL/CONTPROB/
/CAL:PEOPLE'S MOTION FOR RESTITUTION ORDER/DAWT/X:PER THE PEOPLE, THE VCBHAS PAID VICTIM MEGAN M $8,147,76 & IS CLAIMING COMPENSATION FROM THE DEFENDANT/CONTD:POSSIBLE STIPULATION OR TO SET/DAWF/

/CAL:DEJ PROGRESS REPORT/12    XPROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO 10-25-18/X: BAIL SET AT $100000/X:HEARING DATE OF 08-28-18 IS CONFIRMED,/CONTD:BENCH WARRANT STAY, DEJ PROGRESS REPORT AND STATUS/DOPC/

/CAL SENTENCING/X COURT GRANTS DA'S MOTION TO ADD A COUNT 6, PC 245(A)4-FELONY/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:6/X:ALL PARTIES WAIVED PRESENTENCING REPORT FROM PROBATION//FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/X:AS TO COUNT 1, THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A DEFERRED ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, IF HE IS SUCCESSFUL ON PROBATION WITH NO NEW LAW VIOLATIONS FOR THREE YEARS AND PAYS FULL RESTITUTION TO ALL VICTMS, COUNT 1MAY BE DISMISSED,/X:THE SENTENCING FOR COUNT 6 IS AS FOLLOWS:/AJW/CH2:SP4 Y:U:ESS:PROB 5 Y:PJ 1Y/CTS:563/DNACOMP/STATES/RESTV/IND/WS/VF4:300/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/ /COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/SAORD/SA1:MEGAN MURRAY, SHANNON PAREDES, AND ELENA GARRATY/SAORD4:100 YARDS/X:IF DEFENDANT COMPLIES WILL ALL CONDITIONS DEJ WILL BE SET ASIDE, COUNT 1WILL BE DISMISSED AND DEFENDANT TO CONTINUE ON PROBATON FOR COUNT 6/CONTD:DEJ PROGRESSREPORT ON COUNT 1/

/CAL:TO SET OR CASE DISPOSITION/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTSENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:001/FNDG/X:DEFENDANT ADMITS THE ALLEGATION PURSUANT TO 12022,7(A) AS TRUE,/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/REMA/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER,/X:ANY RESTITUTION OR CRIMINAL PROTECTIVE ORDERSRESULTING FROM DISMISSED CHARGES MAY BE ADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN COUNT 1,/ARBUCKLE/TWS/NB/PRES:06-28-17/CONTD:PSR AND SENTENCE/DOP/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/STWPX/BAIL:700,000/X:BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE,/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE AND DISCOVERY STATUS/DOP/
/CAL: TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING AND STATUS/X: 11-05-19 RESTITUTION HEARING IS CONFIRMED, TIME ESTIMATE IS 15 MINUTES,/DOP/X: WITH COMPLETED CR115,/
/CAL: APPOINTMENT OF COUNSEL/DAWT/CON: JAMES SENAL/CONTD: TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING AND STATUS/DAWF
/CAL: TO SET OR DISPO/DAWT/X:DEFENDANT IS IN PRISON/PD/X:MR TAYBACK ASKSTO BE RELIEVED/MO GRTD/CONTD:APPOINTMENT OF COUNSEL/DAWF/
/CAL:TO SET OR DISPO/DAWT/X:THE DEFENDANT IS IN CUSTODY IN NV/CONT/DAWF/
/CAL:TO SET OR STIPULATE/DAWT/DAWT/CONTD:TO SET OR DISPO/DAWF/
/CAL:SENTENCING/TWS/CONTD:SENTENCING OR DEFENDANT MOTION TO WITHDRAW GUILTY PLEA/DOP/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/TE:ONE HALF DAY FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/CONTD:FINAL PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL: TO SET/CONTD: TO SET OR DISPOSITION/DOP/
/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONTD: TO SET OR DISPO/
/CAL: TO SET OR DISPO/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE AND POSSIBLE DISPO SET/DOP/
/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CGTW/CONTD: TO SET OR DISPOSE/DOP/CONTD TO SET OR DISPO, DOP/CONTD:TO SET OR DISPOSE/DOP/
/CAL:PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE & TO SET PRELIM HEARING/CONTD:PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE, TO SET PRELIM AND RELEASE SDT RECORDS/DOP/
/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE AND TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/CGTW/CONTD: FURTHER PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
